name: CalEthos, Inc.
summary: CalEthos, Inc. is a developer of large-scale infrastructure for the digital economy, focused on building a master-planned, onsite-powered data center campus in the Northwestern U.S. Through its wholly-owned subsidiary TerraVolt Infrastructure Inc., the company offers a Physical Infrastructure-as-a-Service (PIaaS) platform integrating behind-the-meter natural gas power with construction-ready data center building sites, utilities, and fiber connectivity for hyperscalers, colocation providers, and data center developers.

products.name: Physical Infrastructure-as-a-Service (PIaaS) Platform
products.description: Turnkey platform integrating onsite behind-the-meter natural gas power with construction-ready data center building sites, utilities, and fiber connectivity.

products.name: Onsite Natural Gas Power Plant
products.description: Behind-the-meter gas-fired power plant providing 300MW-350MW of baseload power with scalability to additional 300MW-600MW by 2030.

products.name: Data Center Campus Building Sites
products.description: Pre-permitted, construction-ready building lots with power, utilities, water rights, and fiber connectivity for data center developers.
